_documentation.description: PharmaGuide scoring configuration aligned to v3.1 schema-aligned arithmetic scoring
_documentation.total_points: 80 calculated server-side (A+B+C+D), 20 fit score computed on device
_documentation.author: PharmaGuide Team
changelog: 3.2.0: Added Section E dose adequacy (EPA+DHA, max 2.0 pts). Bands anchored to EFSA AI 250 mg, FDA QHC 500 mg, AHA CVD 1 g, EFSA TG claim 2 g, AHA/ACC Rx 4 g. PRESCRIPTION_DOSE_OMEGA3 flag at ≥4000 mg/day. A1/A2 parent-total dedup via is_parent_total field.
3.1.1: B1 cap raised from 5 to 8, B1 additive_id deduplication, all subsection caps now config-driven
3.1.0: Rebalanced section caps (B30/C20), A1 max 15, A6 single-efficiency bonus, B5 hidden-mass model, D reachability update
3.0.1: Normalized config to v3.0 section caps and penalty-sign convention; scoring gate kept open for rollout
3.0.0: Arithmetic-only scorer; matching and NLP moved to enrichment

_important_rules.config_driven: Point values and gates live here; scorer reads enriched fields and performs arithmetic only
_important_rules.penalty_sign_convention: Penalties are positive magnitudes and are subtracted in formulas
_important_rules.single_verdict: Verdict precedence is deterministic; first matching rule wins

feature_gates._require_full_mapping_note: ENFORCED: any unmapped active returns NOT_SCORED; keep blend/header classification clean.
feature_gates._probiotic_extended_scoring_note: When true, use extended probiotic bonus module (max +10)
feature_gates._allow_non_probiotic_probiotic_bonus_wit: When true, non-probiotic products can receive probiotic bonus only if strict evidence gates pass.

paths._input_help: Directory containing enriched JSON files (relative to scripts/)
paths._output_help: Directory where scored output will be written

section_maximums._comment: v3.2 section caps. A+B+C+D base = 80; E_dose_adequacy adds up to 2.0 for omega-3 products.
section_maximums._E_note: Section E (Dose Adequacy) is server-side, applicable only to products with explicit EPA/DHA labelled amounts. Score is additive bonus within the 80-pt ceiling.
section_maximums._E_user_profile_note: Section E user-profile is client-side only and is not computed by this script
section_maximums._total_note: Quality score stored server-side. Combined score is Quality(80) + Fit(20) = 100 display

A3_delivery_system._note: Scoring reads enriched delivery_tier; no text matching at scoring time

section_B_safety_purity._formula: B = clamp(0, 30, base_score + min(bonus_pool_cap, bonuses) - penalties)

section_E_dose_adequacy._description: EPA+DHA daily dose adequacy bonus (omega-3 products only). Applied only when explicit per-unit EPA and/or DHA amounts are labelled. Score is an additive bonus within the overall 80-pt quality ceiling.
section_E_dose_adequacy._applicable: Products where ingredient_quality_data contains ingredients with canonical_id 'epa', 'dha', or 'epa_dha' and a usable quantity field.
section_E_dose_adequacy._band_lookup: Uses per_day_mid = (min_serving/day + max_serving/day) / 2 × EPA+DHA mg per unit. Highest matching threshold wins.

_band_sources.250: EFSA (2012) AI for EPA+DHA: 250 mg/day general population
_band_sources.500: FDA qualified health claim minimum for combined EPA+DHA
_band_sources.1000: AHA recommendation for CVD patients: ~1 g/day EPA+DHA
_band_sources.2000: EFSA approved health claim for blood triglycerides: ≥2 g/day
_band_sources.4000: AHA/ACC prescription dose for hypertriglyceridemia (Lovaza/Vascepa); AF risk threshold confirmed in REDUCE-IT, STRENGTH, ASCEND, VITAL trials

manufacturer_violations._note: Read total_deduction_applied and add directly to quality_raw
